message:
feat(connector): activation pipeline refactor, control channel replay protection, and OI audit lifecycle

activation_pipeline:
- Replace push_bounded() Vec-based eviction with BTreeMap keyed by
  secret ID for O(1) lookup during cleanup — ephemeral secrets are now
  tracked by identity rather than insertion order, enabling exact
  cleanup coverage on partial activation failure
- Secret tracker provides deterministic mount/unmount audit trail

control_channel:
- Add per-epoch nonce tracking with nonce_epoch field — when the epoch
  advances, stale nonces from previous epochs are cleared rather than
  accumulating unboundedly
- Add seen_nonce_order VecDeque for bounded nonce storage with FIFO
  eviction when capacity is exceeded
- Prevents cross-epoch replay attacks while bounding memory usage

operator_intelligence:
- Add closed_audit_entries BTreeMap and closed_audit_order VecDeque for
  bounded retention of resolved recommendation audit entries
- Enables post-mortem analysis of accepted/rejected recommendations
  without unbounded audit trail growth
- Audit entry lifecycle: active in audit_trail → closed into
  closed_audit_entries with FIFO eviction

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
